industries.name: Agriculture
industries.description: Agricultural trailers for a number of uses including nurse tank trailers, sprayer trailers, tender trailers, anhydrous applicators, and more.

useCases.name: Anhydrous Wagons
useCases.description: Behnke manufactures anhydrous ammonia wagons for the agricultural industry. Available in a variety of tank configurations and track widths for easy field transport.

trailerTypes.name: GN Wagons
trailerTypes.description: Gooseneck wagons capable of transporting up to 2,900+ gallons of anhydrous. Demco retractable tongue with spring assist, adjustable rear axle standard.

products.crossmembers: 6 x 4 x 3/8 tube w/laser cut holes for tank tie-downs
products.finish: Bead blasted, acid washed, powder coated
features: Comes standard with (2) steps on side

products.model: Walking Tandem Gooseneck Wagon (Twin 1450 gal. Tanks)
Walking Tandem Gooseneck Wagon (Single 3000 gal. Tank)
Walking Tandem Gooseneck Wagon (Twin 2,000 gal. Tanks)

trailerTypes.name: Fixed and Adjustable Wagons
trailerTypes.description: Fixed and adjustable width wagons in single or twin tank configurations. Adjustable models offer 60-80" adjustable track width.

trailerTypes.name: Low Profile Wagons
trailerTypes.description: Low profile wagon design for improved stability and ease of loading. Available with twin 1,000 gal tanks.

useCases.name: Sprayer Trailers
useCases.description: As one of the pioneers in the sprayer trailer market, Behnke offers easily customizable trailers available in a variety of lengths, capacities, and hitch styles.

trailerTypes.name: Pull-Type
trailerTypes.description: Pull-type sprayer trailers from 14K-50K GVW with flip-up outriggers for legal width when empty. Available with pintle or gooseneck hitch.

products.finish: Bead blasted, acid washed, zinc rich primed, powder coated
features: Wood deck in front of outriggers available

trailerTypes.name: Drive-Over
trailerTypes.description: Drive-over sprayer trailers allow the sprayer to drive directly over the trailer. Available from 24K-60K GVW with electric or air brakes.

trailerTypes.name: Semi-Style
trailerTypes.description: Semi-style sprayer trailers rated at 60-80K GVW for mounting multiple large sprayer tanks. Air ride suspension standard.

useCases.name: Tender Trailers
useCases.description: Tender trailers built to accommodate dry or liquid fertilizer tenders. Available in a variety of lengths and weight capacities with laser cut holes for easy tank mounting.

trailerTypes.name: Pull-Type
trailerTypes.description: Pull-type tender trailers for dry or liquid fertilizer transport. Laser cut frame holes match most major manufacturer mounting specs.

trailerTypes.name: Semi-Style
trailerTypes.description: Semi-style tender trailers rated at 60-80K GVW for high capacity dry or liquid fertilizer tender transport.

useCases.name: Cone Trailers
useCases.description: Vertical cone tank trailers available in single, double, and triple configurations to carry whatever brand tank you desire. A portable fertilizer storage solution.

trailerTypes.name: Single Cone
trailerTypes.description: Single vertical cone tank trailer designed for portable fertilizer storage. Multiple configurations and tank brands supported.

trailerTypes.name: Double Cone
trailerTypes.description: Double vertical cone tank trailer for increased portable fertilizer storage capacity.

trailerTypes.name: Triple Cone
trailerTypes.description: Triple vertical cone tank trailer for maximum portable fertilizer storage capacity on a single trailer.

useCases.name: Liquid Transport
useCases.description: Liquid transport trailers for easily moving fertilizer between fields. Available for ag use or fully DOT compliant with poly or stainless steel tanks.

trailerTypes.name: Nurse Tanks (Poly and Stainless)
trailerTypes.description: Nurse tank trailers available in 14K-24K GVW with 1,000-2,200 gallon poly or stainless tanks. DOT compliant options available.

trailerTypes.name: Single Cone Transport
trailerTypes.description: Single cone transport trailers for moving vertical cone tanks from field to field. Available in 14-18K GVW.

trailerTypes.name: Semi-Style (Poly or Stainless)
trailerTypes.description: Semi-style liquid tank transport trailers rated at 60-80K GVW for mounting multiple large fertilizer tanks on one trailer.

industries.name: Construction
industries.description: Construction trailers for a variety of applications with 3,000–80,000 GVWs, manufactured for dealers across the US & Canada.

useCases.name: Deckovers
useCases.description: Deckover trailers have the deck over the wheels for maximum load width. Available in flatbed, tilt, and beavertail configurations with 10K-80K GVW.

trailerTypes.name: Flatbeds
trailerTypes.description: Deckover flatbed trailers from 14K to 80K GVW in lengths from 16' to 40'. Available in gooseneck, pintle, or semi-style hitch with beavertail options.

products.finish: Bead blasted, acid washed, zinc rich primed, powder coated

trailerTypes.name: 8" Channel (BCT)
trailerTypes.description: BCT deckover trailers built with an 8" channel frame for a lighter weight construction. Available in 10K-16K GVW.

trailerTypes.name: Flatbed Tilts
trailerTypes.description: Deckover flatbed tilts available with gravity or power tilt from 14K to 80K GVW. No ramps needed — tilt the deck to load.

trailerTypes.name: Hydraulic Beavertails
trailerTypes.description: Hydraulic beavertail deckover trailers provide a smooth powered loading ramp. Available in 20K to 80K GVW in pull-type and semi-style.

trailerTypes.name: Air Tilts
trailerTypes.description: Air-powered tilt deckover trailers for the lowest possible load angle. Tag-style 40K and 50K models available.

useCases.name: Tiltbeds
useCases.description: Tiltbed trailers offer the ease of never having to use ramps. Available with gravity or power tilt and with deckover or drop deck configurations from 5K to 80K GVW.

trailerTypes.name: Tube Frame Tilts
trailerTypes.description: Tube frame tilt trailers in 14K to 24K GVW. The drop deck design offers a very low loaded height, ideal for skid steers and excavators.

trailerTypes.name: Tilt Utility (6-7k)
trailerTypes.description: Compact utility tilt trailers in 6K-7K GVW. Great for hauling scissor lifts or other small wheeled equipment with full or partial tilt options.

trailerTypes.name: Flatbed Tilts (GN or Pintle)
trailerTypes.description: Flatbed tilt trailers with gooseneck or pintle hitch from 14K to 80K GVW. Gravity or power tilt for easy loading without ramps.

trailerTypes.name: Air Tilts
trailerTypes.description: Air-powered tilt trailers providing the lowest possible load angle for safe and easy equipment loading. Tag-style 40K and 50K models.

useCases.name: Skidloaders
useCases.description: Skidloader trailers come with stand-up ramps, folded down to haul skid steers, mini excavators, and more. Built heavy with a full 83" between fenders. Capacities from 7K-24K.

trailerTypes.name: Angle Frame
trailerTypes.description: Angle iron frame skidloader trailers in 7K-16K GVW with stand-up ramps and 83" between fenders for full-size skid steers.

trailerTypes.name: Channel Frame
trailerTypes.description: Structural channel frame skidloader trailers in 14K-24K GVW with super single tires and true 83" between fenders. Tri-axle model also available.

products.finish: Bead blasted, acid washed, zinc rich primed, powder coated
features: Bolt-on toolbox and spare tire mount

products.model: Triple Axle Directional Drill Ramp Trailer

useCases.name: Dump
useCases.description: Dump trailers built to haul and dump the heaviest loads. Tandem axle dumps are 83" wide, available in 12-16' lengths with 2-3' sides and heavy-duty scissors hoists.

trailerTypes.name: Low-Pro HD Dump (14k - 16k - 20k)
trailerTypes.description: Low profile heavy-duty dump trailers in 14K-20K GVW. 83" wide with 12-16' lengths and beefy scissors hoist for any contractor's needs.

useCases.name: Utility Trailers
useCases.description: Utility trailers available in 2,900-7,000 GVWs, 60-81" widths and 8-16' lengths. Available with no ramps or split mesh gates for hauling smaller equipment.

trailerTypes.name: Utility Tilt
trailerTypes.description: Tilt utility trailers in 5,000-7,000 GVWs — great for hauling scissor lifts or other small wheeled equipment without ramps.

industries.name: Heavy Haul
industries.description: Built for rugged, heavy duty equipment. Heavy haul trailers with capacities from 40,000–110,000 GVWs, strong and durable.

useCases.name: Tags
useCases.description: Tag trailers are deckover trailers with tandem (40K), triple (50K), and quad (60K) axle configurations. Available in 20-32' bed lengths with several ramp and beavertail options.

trailerTypes.name: 40K
trailerTypes.description: 40K tandem axle tag trailer with a 34" unloaded deck height. Bed lengths from 20-32'. Air-hydraulic-bi-folding ramps and beavertails available.

products.finish: Bead blasted, acid washed, zinc rich primed, powder coated
features: Wood or double break tails available
Air ride or lift axles available

trailerTypes.name: 50K
trailerTypes.description: 50K triple axle tag trailer for heavy equipment hauls. Available in 20-32' bed lengths with ramp options and a low ultra-low deck height.

trailerTypes.name: Paver
trailerTypes.description: Our paver tag line utilizes a 6' wood beavertail with hydraulic bi-folding ramps to achieve an 8 degree load angle.

products.length: 25' bed + 6' wood tail w/hydraulic bi-folding ramps
products.finish: Bead blasted, acid washed, zinc rich primed, powder coated
features: 6' wood beavertail with hydraulic bi-folding ramps
Air ride or lift axles available

useCases.name: Tag Tilts
useCases.description: Tag tilts are available in 40,000-50,000 GVWs with both gravity and air tilt configurations for the easiest loading of heavy equipment.

trailerTypes.name: 40-50K
trailerTypes.description: Gravity tilt tag trailers in 40K-50K GVW. No ramps needed — the full deck tilts for easy equipment loading.

trailerTypes.name: Air Tilts (40-50k)
trailerTypes.description: Air-powered tilt tag trailers offering the lowest possible load angle. Ideal for loading low-clearance equipment without ramps.

useCases.name: Semi-Style
useCases.description: All tag and tag tilt models also available with semi-style hitches ranging from 60,000-100,000 GVWs. Double drops and paver style trailers also available.

trailerTypes.name: Ramp Models
trailerTypes.description: Semi-style ramp trailers in 60K-100K GVW for hauling heavy equipment over long distances. Multiple axle configurations available.

trailerTypes.name: Tilt Models
trailerTypes.description: Semi-style tilt trailers in 60K-100K GVW. Power tilt eliminates the need for ramps when loading over-the-road heavy equipment.

trailerTypes.name: Paver
trailerTypes.description: Semi-style step deck trailers designed specifically for paving equipment with low deck profile and specialized loading.

trailerTypes.name: Double Drop
trailerTypes.description: Double drop semi trailers achieve the lowest possible deck height for transporting tall or oversized heavy equipment under height restrictions.

useCases.name: Hydraulic Detaches
useCases.description: Hydraulic detaches offer the easiest loading solution for equipment requiring a low deck height. Tandem, triple, quad, and flip axle configurations available with high tensile steel construction.

trailerTypes.name: Tandem Axle (80K)
trailerTypes.description: 80K hydraulic detachable neck trailer with tandem axle for heavy equipment requiring a very low loading height.

trailerTypes.name: Triple Axle (102-110K)
trailerTypes.description: 102K-110K hydraulic detachable neck trailer with triple or quad axle for the heaviest loads. Flip axle option also available.

industries.name: Commercial
industries.description: Commercial trailers are strong and light, built with the over-the-road driver in mind. Step decks, flat decks, and container trailers with multiple options.

useCases.name: OTR Step Decks
useCases.description: OTR step decks are offered in tandem and triple axle configurations with a 10' upper deck and 38' or 43' lower deck. Available in super low, low, and high tire profiles with air ride suspension and apitong decking.

trailerTypes.name: Super Low (60-80k)
trailerTypes.description: Super low-profile step deck with 30" unloaded deck height. Ideal for tall loads that need maximum clearance under bridges and overpasses.

products.model: Super Low-Profile Over the Road Step-Deck Semi

trailerTypes.name: Low (60-80k)
trailerTypes.description: Low-profile OTR step deck with 35" unloaded deck height. Standard over-the-road step deck with air ride suspension and apitong decking.

products.model: Low-Profile Over the Road Step-Deck Semi

trailerTypes.name: High (60-80k)
trailerTypes.description: High tire OTR step deck with 40" unloaded deck height. Features larger tires for a smoother, better-damped over-the-road ride.

products.model: High Tire Over the Road Step-Deck Semi

useCases.name: Flat Decks (60-80k)
useCases.description: Flat decks available in tandem and triple axle configurations. Standard lengths are 48' and 53'. Air ride suspension and apitong decking are standard.

trailerTypes.name: 60-80K
trailerTypes.description: Over-the-road flat deck semi trailer in 48' or 53' lengths. Air ride suspension and apitong decking standard. Slide axle and multiple axle splits available.

products.model: Over the Road Flat-Deck Semi Trailer

useCases.name: Container Trailers
useCases.description: Container trailers available in several configurations to haul any size shipping container, with twist lock corners and DOT compliant options.

trailerTypes.name: Commercial Container Trailers
trailerTypes.description: Container trailers with twist lock corners to secure 20', 40', or 45' shipping containers. DOT compliant with single or tandem axle options.

industries.name: Utility / Telecom
industries.description: Utility and telecom trailers including directional drill trailers, pole trailers, reel trailers, and more for infrastructure work.

useCases.name: Directional Drill Trailers
useCases.description: Directional drill trailers available in both ramp and tilt models. The ramp style is the industry standard, where the patented split tilt offers a safer loading solution. Both models can be totally customized to dealer mounting specs.

products.model: Triple Axle Directional Drill Ramp Trailer

useCases.name: Pole Trailers
useCases.description: Pole trailers offered in several different length and axle configurations. Single and tandem axle models with 10,000-40,000 GVWs for safe transport of poles to the job site.

useCases.name: Reel Trailers
useCases.description: Reel trailers offered in single and tandem axle configurations for single or multiple reels. The suspension option on the single reel trailer makes for a much smoother ride.

industries.name: OEM
industries.description: Custom OEM trailer manufacturing with full capability to build any trailer to manufacturer-specific configurations. Contact Behnke for volume pricing and custom builds.

useCases.name: Custom OEM Trailers
useCases.description: See what Behnke can do for you. Fully customizable trailers built to your exact specifications with all trailer types available and volume pricing.
